spec_match.rationale: Chrome DevTools MCP verified the page compares a single LCP result with per-container entries from sections marked with containertiming and uses the shared Container Timing support probe.

interactive.rationale: The page now has scenario selection, sidebar delay range, ignored-ad checkbox, simulate/reset controls, and a late article text control that creates an additional container entry.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The demo continues to show LCP as one largest-element signal while Container Timing provides named section-level signals.

edge_cases.rationale: The ignored ad child and late text insertion exercise Container Timing subtree exclusion and new contentful paint update behavior.

references.rationale: The references section includes ChromeStatus, the Chrome origin-trial explainer, the Container Timing draft, and related PerformanceObserver/LCP documentation.

design_system.rationale: Button hover background overrides now set colour, new controls use CSS variables, and MCP reported no console or DevTools issues.

summary: Chrome DevTools MCP on Chrome/151 exercised article-late scenario, sidebar delay, containertiming-ignore on the ad child, late article text insertion, reset cleanup, reference links, no console errors, and the feature conformance route at 6 PASS / 0 FAIL.
